title: rubus × montaurensis
intro: Rubus × montaurensis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or Montaur raspberry, is a rare and exotic hybrid species of the Rubus genus, resulting from the cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have potential health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × montaurensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be consumed fresh or frozen, offering a range of herbal preparations to suit various needs.
